zh.title: 称骨算命全集 - 袁天罡51种骨重命格详解 | Bone Weight Fortune Telling
zh.description: 袁天罡称骨算命法是唐代著名相师袁天罡所创的命理推算体系。以出生年月日时对应骨重（两+钱），查表得出命运判词，共51种骨重等级，每种对应一首四句诗。本站收录代表性骨重命格并进行解读。
zh.keywords: 称骨算命,袁天罡,骨重,命理,八字,Bone Weight Fortune

zh.ogDescription: 唐代袁天罡所创称骨算命法，以骨重推算命运。收录代表性骨重命格及四句判词详解。

en.title: Bone Weight Fortune Telling - Yuan Tiangang's Complete Guide | 称骨算命
en.description: Yuan Tiangang's Bone Weight Fortune Telling (称骨算命) is a Tang dynasty divination system that calculates destiny based on birth date converted to bone weight units. 51 weight levels from 2.1 to 7.2 liang, each with a four-line destiny poem.
en.keywords: Bone Weight Fortune,Yuan Tiangang,Chinese divination,Tang dynasty,destiny poem
en.ogTitle: Bone Weight Fortune Telling - Yuan Tiangang's 51 Destiny Poems
en.ogDescription: Tang dynasty divination: convert your birth date to bone weight, discover your destiny poem. 51 levels from poorest to most fortunate fate.
en.twitterDescription: Yuan Tiangang's Bone Weight Fortune: 51 weight levels, each with a destiny poem. A classic Chinese divination system from the Tang dynasty.

structuredData.name: 称骨算命
structuredData.description: 唐代袁天罡所创称骨算命法，51种骨重命格详解

acceptedAnswer.text: 称骨算命相传为唐代著名相师袁天罡所创。此法将一个人出生的年、月、日、时各对应一个骨重数值（以「两」和「钱」为单位），四者相加得出总骨重，再查表找到对应的四句判词诗，据此推断命运吉凶。共有51种骨重等级，从二两一钱（最轻，命最苦）到七两二钱（最重，命最贵），骨重越大通常意味着命越好。
称骨算命作为一种古代命理学方法，其科学性无法验证。它将所有人简单归入51种命格，粒度远粗于八字命理。但因其简单易用、朗朗上口，千年来在民间广为流传，是中国传统命理文化的重要组成部分。

mainEntity.name: What is Bone Weight Fortune Telling?

acceptedAnswer.text: Bone Weight Fortune Telling (称骨算命) is attributed to Yuan Tiangang, a renowned Tang dynasty diviner. The system assigns a weight value (in liang and qian) to each component of one's birth date (year, month, day, hour). The four values are summed to produce a total bone weight, which corresponds to one of 51 four-line destiny poems describing one's fate. Weights range from 2.1 (lightest, hardest fate) to 7.2 (heaviest, most fortunate).
